Phase 4 Success Criteria
🔴Trial-to-paid conversion ≥ 20%0% — billing not live yet
🔴Gross MRR ≥ $25,000$0 — 7 trialing, 0 paid
⚪Payback period ≤ 6 months at target CACN/A until first paid customer
✅2+ new integrations shippedShopify + Salesforce — live
✅Self-serve Pilot SOW + security pack/pilot/sow and /pilot/security
✅Sales funnel instrumented end-to-endcrr_funnel_events, v_funnel_conversion view
✅14-day trial + nudge sequence live7 nudge emails live, first sweep done
⚡ Next action to unlock conversion: Create Stripe account (hCaptcha currently blocks headless) → set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in Vercel env → billing checkout will go live automatically. All billing infra is already built.
